data.name: WorkHint
data.value: Click "Start Listening" to begin voice recording and translation

data.name: VolumeThresholdHint
data.value: Hint: Audio will only be processed if microphone input volume exceeds this threshold. 0% disables this filtering.

data.name: StatusReadyWithOsc
data.value: Ready to start working and send to VRChat.

data.name: StatusRefreshMicsFailed
data.value: Status: Failed to refresh microphone list: {0}

data.name: StatusNoMicFoundRefreshCheck
data.value: Status: No microphone devices found. Please refresh or check devices.

data.name: StatusTranslationSuccessNoText
data.value: Status: Translation successful, but no text content.

data.name: TranslationSuccessNoTextPlaceholder
data.value: (Server returned success, but no text content)

data.name: FreeTrialQuotaExhausted
data.value: Free trial quota exhausted. Please subscribe to continue.

data.name: RateLimitExceeded
data.value: Too many requests. Please try again later.

data.name: FreeQuotaStartBlockedFormat
data.value: Your free quota is exhausted. Please wait until {0} for refresh (window: {1}), or subscribe to continue.

data.name: FreeQuotaStartBlockedNoReset
data.value: Your free quota is exhausted. Please wait for the quota to refresh (window: {0}), or subscribe to continue.

data.name: StatusSendingToVRChat
data.value: Status: Translation successful! Sending to VRChat...

data.name: StatusOscSendFailed
data.value: Status: Translation successful! But VRChat send failed: {0}

data.name: LogTargetLangsSaved
data.value: Target language settings updated and saved.

data.name: AudioStatusSegmentTooShort
data.value: Audio segment too short, ignored. Listening...

data.name: ValidationMinMaxVoiceDuration
data.value: Minimum voice duration must be less than maximum voice duration.

data.name: ValidationOscPortInvalid
data.value: OSC Port number must be between 1-65535.

data.name: BindMissingUserInfo
data.value: Missing user information. Please log in again.

data.name: BindStartFailedRetry
data.value: Failed to start binding. Please try again later.

data.name: BindStateExpired
data.value: Login state has expired. Please start binding again.

data.name: BindWechatAlreadyBoundOther
data.value: This WeChat account is already bound to another account.

data.name: BindQqAlreadyBoundOther
data.value: This QQ account is already bound to another account.

data.name: BindMissingProviderAccount
data.value: Failed to obtain the third-party account identifier. Please authorize again.

data.name: BindFailedLater
data.value: Binding failed. Please try again later.

data.name: BindInvalidCallbackResult
data.value: No valid binding callback result was received.

data.name: BindEmailCodeSent
data.value: Verification code sent. Please check your email.

data.name: BindEmailCodeSendFailed
data.value: Failed to send verification code. Please try again later.

data.name: BindEmailAlreadyBoundOther
data.value: This email is already bound to another account.

data.name: BindEmailCodeTooFrequent
data.value: Too many requests. Please try again later.

data.name: BindEmailPasswordTooShort
data.value: Password must be at least 8 characters.

data.name: BindEmailFailedLater
data.value: Email binding failed. Please try again later.

data.name: SettingsReverted
data.value: Changes reverted, settings reloaded from last saved state.

data.name: ErrorDeserializingSuccessResponse
data.value: Failed to deserialize server success response: {0}. Response: {1}

data.name: MsgBoxSelectValidMicContent
data.value: Please select a valid microphone before starting work.

data.name: TemplateHint
data.value: Use placeholders like {英文}, {日文}, {中文} to customize the output format. Disable custom template to show the complete server response.

data.name: TemplateActiveHint
data.value: When custom template is enabled, target languages are determined by the template placeholders (max 3 languages). Target language selection is disabled.

data.name: LanguageHint
data.value: Select your preferred interface language. This affects all UI text and default templates.

data.name: TextEntryHint
data.value: Enter text here, press Ctrl+Enter, or click the Send button to send to VRChat.

data.name: ValidationApiKeyRequired
data.value: API Key is required when authentication is enabled.

data.name: ErrorAuthentication
data.value: Authentication failed. Please check your API key: {0}

data.name: BackendServiceConnectionHint
data.value: Configure connection settings to the LinguaLink translation server.

data.name: VoiceRecognitionSettingsHint
data.value: Configure voice activity detection and audio processing parameters.

data.name: VrchatIntegrationHint
data.value: Configure OSC settings to send translated messages to VRChat.

data.name: AudioProcessingHint
data.value: Configure audio encoding options to optimize bandwidth usage.

data.name: OpusEncodingHint
data.value: Opus encoding significantly reduces bandwidth usage by compressing audio data. Recommended for slower internet connections.

data.name: OpusBitrateHint
data.value: Lower bitrates save more bandwidth but may reduce audio quality. 32kbps is recommended for voice.

data.name: OpusComplexityHint
data.value: Higher compression levels achieve better compression ratios but increase CPU usage. Fixed 16kbps bitrate for optimal bandwidth savings. Range: 5-10, Default: 7.

data.name: AudioNormalizationHint
data.value: Peak normalization adjusts audio peaks to a specified level, ensuring consistent volume output. Recommended: -3dBFS.

data.name: QuietBoostHint
data.value: Quiet speech enhancement detects low-volume speech segments and automatically amplifies them to improve speech recognition accuracy.

data.name: QuietBoostRmsThresholdHint
data.value: Gain will be applied when audio segment RMS level is below this threshold. Range: -60dBFS to 0dBFS, Default: -25dBFS.

data.name: QuietBoostGainHint
data.value: Amount of gain applied to quiet segments. Range: 0dB to 20dB, Default: 6dB.

data.name: ValidationPostSpeechRecordingDurationInvalid
data.value: Post-speech recording duration must be between 0.4 and 0.7 seconds.

data.name: ValidationMinVoiceDurationInvalid
data.value: Minimum voice duration must be between 0.4 and 0.7 seconds.

data.name: ValidationMaxVoiceDurationInvalid
data.value: Maximum voice duration must be between 1 and 10 seconds.

data.name: PostSpeechRecordingDurationHint
data.value: Duration to continue recording after VAD detects speech end, for capturing tail sounds. Range: 0.4-0.7s, Recommended: 0.5s.

data.name: MinVoiceDurationHint
data.value: Minimum duration requirement for voice segments. Shorter segments will be ignored. Range: 0.4-0.7s, Recommended: 0.5s.

data.name: MaxVoiceDurationHint
data.value: Maximum duration limit for single voice segments. Longer segments will be force-split. Range: 1-10s, Recommended: 10s.

data.name: ValidationOpusBitrateInvalid
data.value: Opus bitrate must be between 8000-32000 bps.

data.name: ValidationOpusComplexityInvalid
data.value: Opus compression level must be between 5-10.

data.name: OfficialServiceHint
data.value: Use official LinguaLink service with account login (Coming Soon).

data.name: CustomServiceHint
data.value: Connect to your own LinguaLink server with custom URL and API key.

data.name: OfficialServiceSubtitle
data.value: Get started with our managed translation service

data.name: UseCustomServerHint
data.value: Enable this option if you're running your own LinguaLink server

data.name: TemplateLimitWarningMessage
data.value: Your template contains more than 3 language placeholders. Only the first 3 will be requested for translation to ensure performance.

data.name: HistoryFolderMissing
data.value: The storage folder could not be found.

data.name: HistoryOpenFolderFailed
data.value: Unable to open the history folder: {0}

data.name: HistorySelectFolderDialog
data.value: Select a new folder for conversation history.

data.name: HistoryPromptMigrateData
data.value: Move existing history data to the new folder?

data.name: HistoryChangePathFailed
data.value: Failed to change the history storage path.

data.name: UpdateDialogDownloadPrompt
data.value: Update downloaded. Restart now to apply?

data.name: AccountEmailCodeLockHint
data.value: After sending the code, the email field will be locked temporarily.

data.name: AccountBindQqTooltip
data.value: Available when QQ is not bound

data.name: AccountBindWechatTooltip
data.value: Available when WeChat is not bound

data.name: AccountSubscriptionPromptNoSubscription
data.value: No active subscription detected. Subscribe to use the official translation service.

data.name: AccountSubscriptionPromptUnavailable
data.value: Subscription expiry information is temporarily unavailable.

data.name: AccountSubscriptionPromptNoActiveSubscription
data.value: No active subscription detected for this account.

data.name: AccountSubscriptionPromptExpired
data.value: Your subscription has expired. Renew to continue using the service.

data.name: AccountSubscriptionPromptPending
data.value: Your subscription is not active yet. Please check the subscription status.

data.name: AccountSubscriptionPromptExpireToday
data.value: Your subscription expires today. Please renew in time.

data.name: AccountSubscriptionPromptExpireInDaysFormat
data.value: Your subscription expires in {0} day(s). Please renew in time.

data.name: MessageTemplateHint
data.value: Enable this to customize the output format sent to VRChat.

data.name: AccountUsernameTooLong
data.value: Username must be 100 characters or fewer.

data.name: AccountAtLeastOneFieldRequired
data.value: At least one field is required.

data.name: AccountLogoutConfirmMessage
data.value: Are you sure you want to log out?

data.name: AccountVipRequireLogin
data.value: Please log in before activating or renewing VIP.

data.name: AccountSubscriptionReloginRequired
data.value: Your login session has expired. Please log in again before subscribing.

data.name: AuthSessionExpiredRelogin
data.value: Your login session has expired. Please sign in again.

data.name: AuthLoginUnexpectedBindCallback
data.value: Login flow error: received an account-binding callback.

data.name: AuthLoginCallbackMissingToken
data.value: Login callback did not include token information.

data.name: AccountSubscribeSuccess
data.value: Subscription succeeded. Subscription status has been refreshed.

data.name: AccountProviderAlreadyBoundFormat
data.value: {0} is already bound. No need to bind again.

data.name: AccountPlansEmpty
data.value: No purchasable plans are currently available.

data.name: AccountPendingOrderExists
data.value: There is a pending order. Please complete payment or wait until it finishes before creating another.

data.name: AccountPaymentQrMissing
data.value: The payment channel is ready, but no QR code URL was returned. Please create the order again.

data.name: AccountOrderFailed
data.value: Order payment failed. Please create a new order.

data.name: AccountOrderExpired
data.value: The order has expired. Please create a new order.

data.name: AccountOrderCancelled
data.value: The order was cancelled. Please create a new order.

data.name: AccountOrderPollingTimeout
data.value: Order polling timed out. Please refresh the order status manually later.

data.name: AccountOrderRestoreRecoveredFormat
data.value: Recovered order {0}. Click "Query Order" to continue checking status.

data.name: AccountOrderQueryFailed
data.value: Failed to query the order status. Please try again later.

data.name: UpdateDialogSummaryFormat
UpdateDownloadingMessage
data.value: Downloading the update in the background. Please wait...

data.name: UpdateDownloadReadyMessage
data.value: The update has been downloaded. The app will restart to finish installation.

data.name: UpdateApplyErrorFormat
data.value: An error occurred while scheduling the update install: {0}

data.name: UpdateProcessErrorFormat
data.value: An error occurred during the update process: {0}

data.name: WebView2MissingRuntimeMessage
data.value: WebView2 Runtime is required for login and subscription features. Open the download page now?

data.name: CheckoutInitFailed
data.value: Unable to initialize the checkout page. Please try again later.

data.name: CheckoutNavigationFailed
data.value: Unable to load the checkout page. Please check your network connection and try again.

data.name: ApiUnauthorized
data.value: Authentication failed. Please sign in again.

data.name: ApiEndpointNotFound
data.value: API endpoint not found. Please check the server URL.

data.name: ApiRequestTooLarge
data.value: Request too large. Please reduce audio file size or text length.

data.name: CustomVocabularyGuidanceHint
data.value: Hover to view filling tips and examples

data.name: CustomVocabularyGuidanceSummary
data.value: When speech recognition keeps mishearing your specific terms, or the AI does not understand certain slang, use this vocabulary table to teach it.

data.name: CustomVocabularyGuidanceBody
data.value: The app will automatically map your spoken wording to the standard term before sending it to the AI.

data.name: CustomVocabularyTermGuideText
data.value: Core Term: the standard answer you ultimately want the AI to see and understand.

data.name: CustomVocabularyAliasesGuideText
data.value: Aliases: common ASR mistakes, slang, or short forms you often say. Separate multiple items with commas.

data.name: CustomVocabularyPronunciationsGuideText
data.value: Pronunciations: pinyin or English-style readings that can significantly improve recognition. Separate multiple items with commas.

data.name: CustomVocabularyNoteGuideText
data.value: Meaning / Note: optional. Helps the AI understand what the term refers to, such as “a video game” or “an in-game character name”.

data.name: CustomVocabularyExampleBody
data.value: Example for homophone correction: if “Genshin” keeps being recognized as a wrong same-sounding word, set Core Term to “原神”, Aliases to “元神, 圆神”, and Pronunciations to “yuan shen”.

data.name: CustomVocabularySectionHint
data.value: Manage local vocabulary tables for ASR correction. Up to {0} tables, only {1} enabled at a time, with {2} entries and {3} effective characters per table.

data.name: CustomVocabularyNoTableSelected
data.value: Select or create a vocabulary table to start editing.

data.name: CustomVocabularyAliasesHint
data.value: Separate aliases and pronunciation hints with commas or new lines. Up to {0} aliases and {1} pronunciation hints per entry.

data.name: CustomVocabularySelectedTableSummary
data.value: {0}/{1} entries in this table, {2} enabled, {3}/{4} effective characters

data.name: CustomVocabularyTermPlaceholder
data.value: The standard term you want the AI to see

data.name: CustomVocabularyAliasesPlaceholder
data.value: Typos, slang, or short forms, separated with commas

data.name: CustomVocabularyPronunciationsPlaceholder
data.value: Pinyin or English-style readings, separated with commas

data.name: CustomVocabularyNotePlaceholder
data.value: For example: a video game, an in-game character name

data.name: CustomVocabularyNoTablesBody
data.value: Create your first local vocabulary table, then import or add entries below.

data.name: CustomVocabularyBudgetExceeded
data.value: This change would exceed the table character budget of {0}, so it was reverted.

data.name: CustomVocabularyMaxTablesReached
data.value: You have reached the maximum of {0} vocabulary tables.

data.name: CustomVocabularyImportInvalid
data.value: The imported file is invalid or missing a table payload.

data.name: CustomVocabularyImportConflict
data.value: A table named "{0}" already exists. Yes = overwrite, No = import as copy, Cancel = abort.

data.name: CustomVocabularyImportTruncated
data.value: The imported table exceeded one or more limits and was truncated during import.

data.name: CustomVocabularyMaxEntriesReached
data.value: This table already has the maximum of {0} entries.
